description: Pilot retrieval-quality benchmark for sf-docs. Use these cases to validate both qmd-first and no-qmd Salesforce-aware fallback modes.

cases.query: Find official Salesforce documentation about Agentforce authentication, identity verification, OTP flows, how topics are unlocked after authentication, and the security model for agent conversations.
cases.notes: Derived from the original failure example; should avoid generic 404/web-shell behavior.

cases.query: Find official Salesforce documentation about Messaging for In-App and Web domain and security configuration, allowed domains, CORS/origin restrictions, and embedded deployment security settings.
cases.notes: This is a known hard case for naive fetches; fallback quality matters.

cases.query: Find the official Salesforce documentation for System.StubProvider in Apex and explain when to use it in tests.
Find the official Salesforce REST API documentation for authentication requirements and bearer token usage.
Find the official Salesforce Metadata API documentation for deploy and retrieve patterns.
Find the official Salesforce object reference documentation for Account and standard object metadata lookup.
Find official Lightning Web Components documentation explaining the wire service and wire adapters.
Find the official Salesforce documentation for Agentforce Agent Script and Atlas reasoning engine behavior.
